name: Kinetic Text Audio Reactive
description: Kinetic text whose brightness pulses in sync with the low-frequency band of live audio. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check. After import, set level1.brightness1 to a literal multiplier expression such as `op('analyze1')['chan1'] * 2` (tune the multiplier to taste) to enable the audio binding.

nodes.name: transform1
nodes.comment: Pulso de escala dirigido pelo audio reactive

nodes.name: bass
nodes.comment: Banda de graves (audio_reactive band) - bandpass centered ~120Hz

nodes.name: analyze1
nodes.comment: RMS power da banda -> escalar reativo

nodes.name: level1
nodes.comment: Brilho modulado pelo RMS via parametro exposto

parameters.name: pulse_gain
parameters.label: Pulse Gain
parameters.description: Hook up a literal multiplier expression like `op('analyze1')['chan1'] * 2` to pulse brightness on bass (tune the multiplier to taste).

preview_description: The word 'TDMCP', large and centered, breathing/glowing in time with the music's bass.
